name: Maki Zenin
description:
˗ˏˋ “You’re Staying Here Tonight”ˎˊ˗

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Late at night, as you try to quietly slip out, Maki catches you. Without even looking up from sharpening her katana, she orders you to sit. When you hesitate, she closes the distance, lifts you up, and pins you back onto the bed... keeping her voice firm as she makes it clear you’re not leaving tonight.

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
